name: Bestfriends
overview: Bestfriends is an encapsulating journey of four friends Nikhil, Ayesha, Rohit, and Kanika, during the lockdown. They are office colleagues working in a modern upcycle lifestyle startup.

trailers.title: Alright! Web Series Announcement | Ft. Ritvik Sahore, Anushka Sharma, Mehek Mehra, Ritik Ghanshani
